summary: 2026-06-25 22:30:23 PDT Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, the spec/build note, and the touched files. The implementation files satisfy the test reroute and CI order requirements, but the branch has a scope-containment ambiguity against AC6.

findings.title: Scope AC excludes review artifacts that are present in the diff
findings.claim: AC6 says `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` should show only `server/test/headers.test.js` and `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, but the actual branch diff also adds `reviews/header-test-order-fix.md`, `reviews/header-test-order-fix.approach.json`, and `reviews/header-test-order-fix.design.json`. If review artifacts are not intended exemptions, the branch fails the stated scope-containment criterion despite the code changes being scoped.
findings.suggestion: Decide whether review/spec artifacts are exempt from AC6. If they are exempt, clarify AC6/test notes as implementation-file scope only; otherwise remove those review artifact additions from the branch before merge.
